[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100110001 5
1 1111001011 7
2 1010110001 5
3 1011010100 5
4 0100000010 2
5 1001100010 4
6 0000000000 a
7 0000000000 a

01 10 1111111111 a
12 21 1101111101 8
23 32 1111111011 9
34 43 1111111011 9
45 54 1011110101 7
56 65 1111010110 7
67 76 1101100010 5
70 07 1111111111 a

02 20 1110111111 9
13 31 1111101111 9
24 42 1110110001 6
35 53 1111011111 9
46 64 1110110011 7
57 75 1011110110 7
60 06 1110011111 8
71 17 1101101110 7

03 30 1111011111 9
14 41 1111111101 9
25 52 1111110101 8
36 63 1111001011 7 match 1
47 74 1011110011 7
50 05 1111011111 9
61 16 0101101110 6
72 27 1101110011 7

04 40 1110111111 9
15 51 1111111100 8
26 62 1100110011 6
37 73 1111101011 8
